summary: Incomplete deliverable: references missing fixtures/basic.json, fixtures/with-rules.json, MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1, and .actrc—cannot validate workflow or run tests. Provided scripts show decent PowerShell conventions (Set-StrictMode, -ErrorActionPreference Stop, proper cmdlet binding, ordered hashtables for deterministic JSON) but have gaps: Get-CartesianProduct lacks explaining comments; Run-ActTests.ps1 sets unused CONFIG_PATH_OVERRIDE and overwrites $cases[0].ExpectIn awkwardly; hardcoded test expectations (MATRIX-COMBO-COUNT=4, =6) lack clear derivation; property normalization logic duplicated across ConvertFrom-AxisHashtable and ConvertTo-OrderedHashtable. Workflow structure is sound (pinned actions, least-privilege perms, proper job dependencies, pwsh shell) but untestable without fixtures. Missing Pester test file prevents TDD validation (requirement #1, #3).
